articleDir.description: The directory path where your Markdown files (.md) are stored.

imageDir.description: The directory path where your image files are stored.

outputDir.description: The directory path where all build outputs are exported.

categories.description: A whitelist of allowed categories. Unregistered categories found in markdown will be skipped.

tags.description: A whitelist of allowed tags. Unregistered tags found in markdown will be skipped.
